meta.title: GS Support Feed — Demo
meta.description: Installs GS Support Feed from the WordPress.org plugin directory and seeds a couple of monitored plugins/themes.
meta.author: georgestephanis

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; if ( function_exists( 'gs_support_manager' ) ) { gs_support_manager()->add_monitored_item( 'woocommerce', 'plugin', 'WooCommerce' ); gs_support_manager()->add_monitored_item( 'twentytwentyfour', 'theme', 'Twenty Twenty-Four' ); gs_support_manager()->fetcher->sync_all(); }
